## Testing

- [ ] `ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy hermes_plugin_tinyfish`
- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] `python -m build`

## Upgrade Safety

- [ ] This change does not modify Hermes core files.
- [ ] This change does not require patching Hermes update scripts.
- [ ] This change does not log TinyFish API keys or MCP tokens.
